title: Hiring Category Manager at Urban Ladder

jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Urban Ladder
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Urban Ladder. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Urban Ladder:
Urban Ladder is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Ladder!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
